overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Liberation showing the protagonist Aveline walking through 18th-century colonial New Orleans. The character explores a sunlit historic district featuring wooden colonial architecture, cobblestone streets, and palm trees, passing from a cannon emplacement near a cathedral through narrow alleys to a bustling market area decorated with colorful festival banners.

agents.ego_description: walking around a cannon emplacement, briefly turning to face the camera before proceeding toward a large church

notable_agents.action: colonial soldier standing near the church entrance

entered.detail: large rusted cannon on wooden carriage with iron wheels
stacked oak barrels near the cannon
broken wooden palisade fencing lying on the ground
large white wooden church with shuttered windows and twin towers

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit colonial plaza with dry grass ground cover. A large cannon and wooden barrels occupy the foreground while a grand white wooden church dominates the background. The character walks around the cannon, briefly faces the camera, then proceeds toward the church facade.

scene_state.functional_zone: church exterior and narrow service alley

events.description: camera tilts upward to reveal the full height of the church towers against the sky
character turns down a narrow brick alley between wooden buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the church wall while looking up at the architecture, then turning into a narrow passage

entered.detail: tall twin bell towers with arched windows and weathered wood siding
shadowed passage between closely spaced wooden buildings
white painted support beams leaning against building facade

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the massive wooden church, with the camera tilting up to emphasize the twin towers against the bright sky. She then turns down a narrow brick alleyway, passing wooden scaffolding and leaving the open plaza behind.

events.description: exits narrow alley into open street lined with palm trees and colonial mansions

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow passages and emerging onto a sunlit street with palm trees

notable_agents.action: man in colonial dress walking along the iron fence

entered.detail: string of triangular yellow and green flags stretched across the street
two-story red building with white trim and wrought iron balcony railings
tropical palm trees lining the street
black wrought iron fence surrounding the mansion property

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow brick passage decorated with hanging pennant banners, then emerges into a wider cobblestone street. A prominent red colonial mansion with iron fencing and palm trees comes into view on the left as the scene opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with shops and market stalls

events.description: approaching colorful festival decorations marking a market entrance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the commercial street, passing various NPCs and shop fronts

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: colonial-era shops with wooden shutters and hanging signs
wooden tables and crates displaying goods for sale
colorful purple green and gold fabric banners decorating an archway entrance

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds down a bustling cobblestone commercial street lined with wooden shop fronts. Various NPCs in colonial dress walk about, and the character approaches a vibrant market entrance decorated with colorful Mardi Gras-style banners.

events.description: passing through the colorful decorated archway into the market area

agents.ego_description: walking through the decorated market area, passing groups of NPCs gathered near stalls

notable_agents.action: group of men in period clothing conversing near wooden crates

entered.detail: wooden lattice archway draped with purple green and gold fabric decorations
stacked wooden shipping crates along the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the festive archway adorned with colorful banners, entering a lively market area. The street continues with cobblestone paving, wooden crates, and various market stalls while NPCs gather and converse along the route.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a quiet, sunlit colonial plaza into the vibrant heart of a bustling city market. It begins in an open square with dry grass, moving past a large cannon and wooden barrels toward the facade of a grand white wooden church. As the camera tilts up to capture the church's twin towers, the character turns away from the open plaza and descends into a narrow brick alleyway lined with scaffolding. The scene then opens up as she passes under hanging pennant banners, emerging from the passage onto a cobblestone street featuring a red colonial mansion and palm trees. Finally, the camera follows her past wooden shop fronts and colonial pedestrians, passing through a festive archway of colorful banners into a lively market filled with stalls and gathering crowds.
